LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-09-2022 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT AND THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ACCOUNT STATED IS GRANTED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) ORDER SIGNED. SEPARATE JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-26-2022 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's Motion for Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff American Express National Bank's motion for summary judgment as to the first cause of action for open book account and the second cause of action for account stated is granted.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2022 Set For Trial On Jul-05-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
